name: BBO vs Deep Book Divergence (Reversal)
hypothesis: Previous tests (e.g., iter006_deep_book_vs_bbo_divergence) showed that when BBO imbalance is strongly positive but the deep book is negative, betting on the BBO direction fails spectacularly. This spec tests the opposite: that this divergence is a high-conviction reversal signal predicting an imminent price drop.
mutation_note: Inverting the direction of the parent spec from long_if_pos to long_if_neg to test the reversal hypothesis, based on its documented failure with WR < 10%.
